item.title: My Favorites
item.description: A highly curated collection of my most utilized resources, design tools, and editorial inspirations.

item.title: My Favorite Apps
item.description: A look at the applications that power my modern workflow, from minimalist writing tools to a high-end research stack.

item.title: Fantasy Sports Resources
item.description: A curated collection of the best resources for modern fantasy sports fans.

item.title: Pickleball
item.description: Pickleball is more than just a trend; it is a cultural shift in how we approach community sports.

item.title: The Art of Collating
item.description: Collating is more than just gathering; it is the deliberate act of organizing information to reveal new insights.

item.title: Exploring California through Photography
item.description: California offers a diverse landscape for artists and photographers. From the misty coastlines of the north to the arid deserts of the south.

item.title: Design Systems in Modern Web
item.description: A good design system is like a well-tended garden. It provides structure while allowing for organic growth.
